overview.description: The Janus Henderson Short Duration Income ETF (VNLA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively-managed fixed income fund that aims to outperform the FTSE 3-Month US Treasury Bill Index by holding a wide range of fixed income securities with an aggregate duration target of 0-2 years. VNLA was launched on Nov 16, 2016 and is issued by Janus Henderson.
